environment_variables.name: SUPABASE_URL
environment_variables.purpose: Project URL for the Supabase project.

environment_variables.name: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
environment_variables.purpose: Browser-safe public key for future Supabase read/auth flows.

environment_variables.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
environment_variables.purpose: Server-only secret for future admin and write operations.

environment_variables.name: SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD
environment_variables.purpose: Database password used for CLI link/setup and optional direct DB access.

environment_variables.name: DATABASE_URL
environment_variables.purpose: Direct Postgres connection string for future server-side database access.

environment_variables.name: MVP_ENABLE_SUPABASE_REQUEST_API
environment_variables.purpose: Feature gate for the request API boundary scaffold.

environment_variables.name: MVP_ENABLE_REQUEST_API_WRITES
environment_variables.purpose: Feature gate for request API write paths.

environment_variables.name: MVP_ENABLE_SUPABASE_AUTH
environment_variables.purpose: Feature gate for future Supabase Auth binding.
